title: Forest Watchtower
description: Adds a Watchtower with villagers to the forest biome
body:
**This mod adds a Forest Watchtower that can only be found in forest biomes.**

Inside, you'll discover Villager workers and some loot.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b6bc5f3774d1eabf1069d5cbd17d9820cde4b97.jpeg)

The structure has a 3 layers with decorations, loot and Villagers.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b687b00ee8246cd4c31192451d164793b20516f.jpeg)

At the top of the watchtower, there's a campfire to make it easily visible from afar.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9669510674363e5708d826b4584946aafffa189a.jpeg)

**Feel free to put it in your modpack!**
